series_metadata.series_description: The Data Warehouse Database Backups are tape backups needed to restore a system in case of a disaster or inadvertent destruction. The Data Warehouse is a consolidation of data, from across the BWC, into a consistent format for reporting and analysis. Reference general schedule IT-OP-06.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain the weekly backups on-site for 4 weeks, and then destroy. Send copies of the weekly backups to an off-site storage facility, retain for 4 weeks, and then destroy., Electronic: Erase
